data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Soar As Trump Vows To Hit Iran 'Hard'; Tesla Deliveries Due
data.description: Following President Trump's announcement of plans to intensify actions against Iran in the upcoming 2-3 weeks, futures experienced a decline while oil prices surged. The Dow Jones futures dropped, and there was a notable increase in oil prices. Additionally, this news coincided with the anticipation of Tesla deliveries.

data.title: Tesla Deliveries Due. Elon Musk's EV Giant Will Reclaim This Crown.
data.description: The delivery numbers for Tesla in the first quarter are expected to be released soon, making Elon Musk's electric vehicle company likely to maintain its position as the leader in battery electric vehicles. Although Tesla's stock experienced a drop, it has shown an increase over the course of the week.
IRAN'S TOP STEEL MAKERS SHUT DOWN AFTER AIRSTRIKES.

data.title: X-Bow and UNION Partner to Deliver Adaptive, Surge-Capable Manufacturing for Propulsion Systems
data.description: Albuquerque, New Mexico - On April 2, 2026, X-Bow Systems Inc (X-Bow) and UEP, Inc. (UNION Technologies) revealed a partnership. X-Bow is known for their advanced manufactured solid rocket motors (SRMs), sub-orbital launch solutions, and defense technologies. UNION, also known as UNION Technologies, has joined forces with X-Bow, a leading non-traditional producer in the industry. This collaboration is expected to bring about significant advancements and innovations in the field.

data.title: Market reaction to Trump's Iran address: Oil surges, stocks drop amid uncertainty over Middle East conflict.
data.description: Following an unclear case made by the president for continuing the war in the Middle East, oil prices experienced a surge while stock prices plummeted. The fluctuation was notable, with oil prices rising by a significant margin and stock market indices registering a notable decline.

data.title: Zeto Announces FDA 510(k) Clearance of Zeto New Wave™, Advancing Efficiency in Outpatient EEG
data.description: A medical technology company based in Raleigh, North Carolina, Zeto, Inc., has introduced a new product aiming to enhance access to Electroencephalography (EEG) in outpatient clinics. The announcement was made on April 2, 2026. Zeto, Inc. is dedicated to promoting brain health insights via EEG, considering it a crucial vital sign in healthcare. The development is significant as it aims to improve the availability and usage of EEG in outpatient settings.

data.title: Hartree Partners Completes Acquisition of Touton SAS
data.description: Hartree Partners, LP, a worldwide energy and commodities trading company, has successfully acquired Touton SAS, a prominent independent soft commodity trading firm. The completion of this acquisition was announced in New York and Bordeaux today. This strategic move by Hartree is aimed at expanding its presence in the commodities market, following its acquisition of ED&F Man Com in July 2025. The acquisition of Touton comes after thorough consultations with employees' representatives and meeting all standard closing conditions.

data.title: Yukon Metals Intersects 11.7 g/t Gold Within Extensive Vein System in First Drill Program and Expands Land Package at Star River Property
data.description: In its initial drill program, Yukon Metals has discovered a significant vein system at the Star River property, yielding an impressive 11.7 grams per ton of gold. This discovery has prompted the company to expand its land package. This development marks a promising start for Yukon Metals as they continue to explore and assess the potential of their property.

data.title: NevGold Announces Up to 99% Gold Recovery From Phase II Metallurgical Testwork on Oxide Antimony-Gold; Identifies More Antimony Mineralization At Surface In Historical Gold Waste Dump
data.description: Vancouver, BC, 02/04/26 - NevGold Corp. (TSXV:NAU) (OTCQX:NAUFF) (Frankfurt:5E50) has released new results from metallurgical testing on residual tailings post the successful Phase II antimony testwork of November 5, 2025. The tailings from antimony leaching contained gold mineralization, undergoing a second leaching phase for gold extraction. These outcomes emphasize the exceptional geological attributes of the Limousine Butte Project in Nevada, a significant mining region. The company's statement, reiterated in past releases and now validated by tests, confirms that traditional leaching methods for antimony recovery do not significantly impact gold retrieval.

data.title: Freedom Premium Finance Selects Input 1 for Premium Finance Infrastructure
data.description: On April 2, 2026, Input 1 revealed that Freedom Premium Finance, LLC, a recently established premium finance firm situated in Ardmore, Oklahoma, has chosen Input 1's platform to facilitate its initial operations and future expansion plans. This collaboration signifies a significant step for Freedom Premium Finance as it ventures into the financial landscape.

data.title: Edly Launches "Affordable When You Need It Most" Flight Training Loans for Aspiring Pilots
data.description: Edly, a fintech lending platform, has introduced income-based repayment (IBR) education loans tailored to align with the pilot journey, aiding students during training and early career stages as their earnings increase. This initiative, launched in New York on April 2, 2026, aims to provide more support to students as they navigate the financial challenges of pursuing higher education.
Company director increases personal shareholding by acquiring 5,000 shares.
